In the One Piece Episode 1163, titled “I Want You to Praise Me - The Reunion of Robin and Saul,” One Piece delivered one of the most emotional reunions in the entire series as Robin finally reunited with Saul after 22 years of pain, loneliness, and survival. The little girl who once lost everything in Ohara finally broke down in tears in front of the man who first told her she deserved to live. When Robin asked, “Can you praise me for holding out this long?”, it felt like decades of heartbreak and silent suffering came pouring out at once. Seeing the Straw Hats cry beside her while Saul stood there alive again made this moment unforgettable for every One Piece fan.#onepiece1163 #robin #luffy #nicorobin #onepiece

Lighter and thinner than any Merc ever before! The new @Nike Football Mercurial Vapor 17 Elite no longer takes a backseat to the Superfly, with an extremely minimal, but still distinctly Mercurial execution! How do you rate them on first impressions? #nikefootball #mercurial #vapor #nike #sr4u

Are they really back? Yes, absolutely. We exclusively tested both new Mercurial models in Madrid (thanks to @Nike Football and @hubcommnet), as always, we want to give you every possible detail to build your own opinion: visuals, product insights, but most importantly our real feedback after using them on pitch, in matches and during specific training sessions that seriously “stressed” both boots. The new Superfly sends a very clear message as soon as you put it on: innovation built to deliver maximum propulsion. That’s exactly what the forefoot “plate” gives you, an aggressive sense of push and energy return that you can genuinely feel while sprinting. Vapor changes too and the almost “strange” feeling when wearing it for the first time is actually maximum comfort. Not because Mercurial Vapor has never been comfortable, but comfort has probably never been the first thing that comes to mind when thinking about this boot. Other details you’ll definitely want to know: Vapor is the lightest Mercurial ever made at just 130g, while Superfly features a very grippy upper despite being a product fully focused on speed and sprinting. Sizing? Stay relaxed with your usual Nike size, this is 100% true to size. We have a lot more content directly filmed in Madrid coming very soon, so as always, feel free to leave your questions in the comments. There’s a lot more coming... #bootsculture #NikeMercurial #Mercurial #footballboots

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Respuesta a @Veronica Estética Y no se me confundan con los Polis (PHAs); ellos son hidrosolubles pero de molécula gigante, por eso son tan amigables con las pieles sensibles. En cuanto a los despigmentantes como el Tranexámico o el Kójico, la mayoría también aman el agua, por eso la preparación de la piel es vital para que logren penetrar y llegar al melanocito…. #cosmiatra #cosmiatria #peeling #peelingfacial #cosmetologa

Recipe below!👇🏼Why spend at M&S when you can make it at home and even better 🍓☀️ ⭐️ Ingredients: - 6-8 fresh strawberries (preferably similar size) - 4 slices of soft white bread (crustless milk bread if possible) - 200ml double cream - 2 tbsp sugar - 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (optional) ⭐️ Method： 1. Wash strawberries. 2. Beat heavy cream with sugar (and vanilla if using) until stiff peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on bread, place strawberries, cover with more cream, and top with another bread slice. 4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes. 5. Slice cleanly and enjoy! #sando #strawberrysando #strawberries #strawberriesandcream #aesthetic #trending #marksandspencer #viral #fyp #baking #baketok #dessert #explore #Recipe #EasyRecipe

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

the hair care routine that keeps my hair healthy ✨    all products linked on my shopmy which is linked in my bio    here’s the exact timeframe i follow each week: • i oil my hair 1–3x a week • i wash my hair based on oiliness, usually about every 2 days. i don’t follow a strict wash schedule • i use either a milk treatment, protein treatment, hair mask, or hair gloss about once a week #haircare #hairtok #healthyhair #hairroutine #hairtreatment

Sometimes all we need is moisture without all the extra ingredients. Here are my favorite deep conditioners that DO NOT contain protein from Ulta! @Matrix @Pureology @amika @Pattern #hairtok #deepconditioning #HairCareTips #haircareproducts

Its all abt consistency!!🖤 But here's my routine💕 -wash my hair 3-4times a week.  -shampoo only focus on my scalp (not to my length).  -shampoo sles and non sls (like 2 times non sls and 1 time sles, its for balance my scalp n length) -always use conditioner in every hairwashday -hairmask 2times a week (after shampoo when ur scalp alrdy clean, on wet hair not dry) -always use heat protect (spray serum or cream) -also took some suplement d3 n zincplus -always trim my splits end every month for 1-2cm -always massage my scalp for 10min  -hair oiling 2-3times a week, im using rosemary based for hair growth. -scalp serum once a day.  -scrunchie and hair silk bonnet for sleep. -eat more protein and sleep enough. #hairtransformation #hairgrowth #longhair

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Classic chocolate chip cookies 🤤 Yields: 15-16 Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 75-80g balls. •Place the cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 165-170C. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream. NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. This isn’t a routine that I think everyone *needs* to do, but for those who are also interested in promoting scalp health & improving hair retention, hopefully this gives you some steps to choose from that might help! Also- the results I’ve seen would only be from the scalp serums + shampoos alone because I haven’t been using the scalp device or red light helmet long enough to see any visible change yet. LMK if you want videos on my top recommendations for scalp serums + scalp focused shampoos next! Products Mentioned: 1. Pantene Abundant & Strong Serum 2. Neutrogena Hair Restore Serum  3. OGX Pro Growth + Peptide Shampoo 4. Dr Groot Scalp Revitalizing Hair Thickening Shampoo 5. DS Labs Scalp Activator - this was gifted with no obligation to review 6. Current Body Red Light Helmet - this was gifted with no obligation to review #scalpcare #hairroutine #haircareroutine #healthyhair

double chocolate dipped strawberry banana bread muffins, perfect for valentines🤎    recipe:   ingredients 3 ripe bananas ½ cup neutral oil (110 g) ¾ cup granulated sugar (150 g) ¼ cup brown sugar (55 g) 2 large eggs rt  ¼ cup sour cream or greek yogurt (60 g) 1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) ½ cup cocoa powder (45 g) 1¼ tsp baking soda (6 g) ½ tsp salt (3 g) ½ tsp instant coffee  dark chocolate chips or chunks 6-7 strawberries chopped  instructions preheat the oven to 425°F and line a muffin tin. in a large bowl, whisk together the mashed bananas, oil, sugars, eggs, sour cream, and vanilla until smooth and glossy. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, instant coffee, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined, then gently fold in the chocolate and strawberries  fill the muffin liners almost all the way to the top. top with strawberries and chocolate & bake at 425°F for 5 minutes, then without opening the oven door, reduce the temperature to 350°F and continue baking for 14–17 minutes, until the tops are domed and a toothpick comes out with moist crumbs. let cool a bit before transferring to a cooling rack. #chocolate #strawberry #bananabread #muffins #Recipe
